Okay, so the next thing is pre. Pre is what you would drink instead of coffee, red water, monster, or some sort of unhealthy, terrible, sugary drink that's gonna give you the jitters and be just generally awful for you, okay? So what it does is, besides giving you focus and energy, which it will, and it comes without stimulants, and you can add stimulants into it if you feel like it, which as a side note is awesome, because that way, if you take it in the morning, you can add the stimulants, if you work out in the afternoon, you don't have to add them in. And if you're somebody who's really sensitive to them, you can add half serving, if you're like, I can take as much caffeine as humanly possible, you can take a full trip of serving, which should be called ludicrous mode, it's insane. So use that at your own demise. Anyways, what it does, besides giving you the energy, is it will force your body to burn more calories during your workout than you otherwise would. So you actually get more bang for each minute in the gym. Now, most of our clients take it because they don't like the feeling of being bloated from excess fluid, from like, let's say, a huge monster, or a Red Bull, or something like that. You only need four ounces to get the full effect, and you don't want a lot of liquid slushy water you should make anyways, but you work out. Does that make sense? Okay, cool. Now, here's the real reason that a lot of people have so much success with this. It helps with the number one, like in using it for the six week challenge, it helps with the number one thing that most people struggle with besides soreness, it's lack of motivation, right? Or not wanting to go to the gym. And that's just in the beginning, right? And I mean, we gotta make the habits become habits first. And so here's the trick, you take this right before you get in the car, before you need to put your workout clothes on, and it'll start hitting you, and then all of a sudden you're gonna be like, oh my God, I need to go to the gym right now. So if you feel like you're motivated, like all you do is you take pre and it will get you in the mind space to go and attack. Now, besides the psychological benefits, it'll help increase blood flow to muscles, so it works as a perfect synergist with intra, and one provides the nutrients, while the other provides the transports. It's like the truck that carries the bricks to the construction site. You need both to build the house. You have to have the truck, and you have to have the bricks, you need both. So, intra's like the bricks, pre is like the truck bringing it to the site. As a side note, it also tastes great. But remember, this is not going to solve all your motivation problems for the rest of your life, but it will help you push through your workouts, get more out of them, burn more calories during it, and actually get your butt in the gym. And I can't say it many times that people say like, I really wasn't gonna come to the gym, I took a double serving of pre, and I was like ready to rock. And it works, that's why people use it, that's why we have such high success percentages with the challenge. That makes sense.
